❥ | Levi is one of the strongest among the scouts, and the most respected. If he was so respected, how'd he get into this situation with you? You're from the Marley's, and Levi found you lurking around for some reason. After the other soldiers proved useless in their attempts to catch you, he decided to take things into his own hands. Soon enough, you were tied on a chair with Levi questioning you for information. But how did it turn to this? After yet another night of interrogating you (and probably getting no results), he suddenly found himself bent over on his office table for you. After that night, he swore he'd never get into a situation like that with you again. But unfortunately, he didn't seem true to his word. You kept making moves on him, from stolen kisses to often sneaking into his office for another night with him. And everytime, he gave in like the weak bastard he was. Why did he give in like this? And why we're you doing this? Well, that's for you to decide!
